personal.name: Aadith Yadav Govindarajan
personal.description: Electrical Engineering student at NUS with an interest in VLSI and the semiconductor industry.

projects.title: Robust 1-bit 10T SRAM on CMOS 45nm technology node
projects.description: As a part of the IEEE SSCS Student Circtuit Contest 2025, designed and verified a robust 1-bit 10T SRAM cell with read and write access functionalities on CMOS 45nm technology node using LTspice and Verilog.

projects.title: Aadith Panels
projects.description: A social enterprise founded by myself focused on sustainable energy solutions by providing solar panel system designs to small power-intensive firms & organisations.

projects.title: E-Library GUI System
projects.description: Built an E-Library system for Radha-Govinda Temple to manage and keep track of their theological book inventory and lending system.

projects.title: E-Bike Conversion
projects.description: Converted mechanical bicycle to an electric bicycle with a 250W motor, 24V battery and a custom PCB for control systems.

experience.description: Had an opportunity to learn the workings of SAP. Web development with ReactJs, NextJs and Python for EPR related projects.
Founded a social enterprise, consisting of a team of 7, focused on sustainable energy solutions, providing solar panel system designs to small power-intensive firms and organisations.
Assisted in the design of compressor blade with modal analysis using ANSYS, basics of CAD modelling for turbine fan blade, unittesting for python codebase and basics of project management.

publications.title: Computation of maximum slosh wave height for various viscous liquids with linear and non-linear models
publications.journal: ZAMM - Journal of Applied Mathematics and Mechanics

education.degree: B.Eng. Electrical Engineering with Second Major in Physics
education.description: B.Eng. Electrical Engineering with Second Major in Physics, specialising in VLSI
HL: Physics, Mathematics AA, German B, SL: English A L&L, Chemistry, Economics, Extended Essay in Physics
